title: チャンピオンズCにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Champions Cup is here, and
Copano Rickey will be going up against two
powerhouses of the dirt track, Hokko Tarumae
and Wonder Acute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite getting off track with media
commitments during the summer, Copano Rickey
faces the challenge cheerfully, believing it was all
a necessary experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Hokko Tarumae as her opponent, can she
prove that she's ready for her senior year
competition?
